  • Changelog

    Run the cor_coxph analysis module

    run_cor_coxph.Rd

    Equivalent to cd cor_coxph && make.

    run_cor_coxph(
  trial = Sys.getenv("TRIAL"),
  stage = as.integer(Sys.getenv("stage", "2")),
  clean = TRUE,
  report = TRUE,
  use_win = .use_win()
)

    Arguments

    trial

    Character. TRIAL label. Defaults to Sys.getenv("TRIAL").

    stage

    Integer. Stage number (1 or 2) for vat08_combined. Defaults to Sys.getenv("stage", "2").

    clean

    Logical. Delete output/<trial> before running.

    report

    Logical. Build the chapter PDF after analysis.

    use_win

    Logical. Source scripts from win/cor_coxph/code/ instead of cor_coxph/code/. Defaults to the package platform setting (see set_platform).

    Value

    Invisibly returns TRUE.

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
Sys.setenv(TRIAL = "moderna_mock")
run_cor_coxph()
run_cor_coxph(clean = FALSE, report = FALSE)
} # }

    Contents
